doc_title: California State Bar Emergency Access to Justice Protocol 2025 (EAJP-2025)
label: fabricated
reason: This protocol describes a non-existent regulatory framework that fundamentally contradicts current California law regarding the unauthorized practice of law and attorney supervision requirements.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 100
REASON: The California State Bar has not authorized paralegals to draft and file motions without pre-filing attorney review, as this would conflict with existing Business and Professions Code statutes regarding the unauthorized practice of law.
